input.user_input: My client is planning to acquire a competitor. How do I assess whether the deal will trigger HSR antitrust filing thresholds?

actual:
To assess whether your client’s planned acquisition will trigger a mandatory premerger notification under the Hart-Scott-Rodino (HSR) Antitrust Improvements Act, you must evaluate the transaction against three primary tests. 

Because the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) adjusts HSR thresholds annually (typically in late January or early February, based on changes in the Gross National Product), it is critical to use the thresholds in effect at the time the transaction will close. The figures below reference the 2024 thresholds for illustrative purposes.

Here is the step-by-step framework for assessing HSR reportability:

### 1. The Commerce Test
